status_detail: BODY_PRESENT - APF response body reaches browser ReadableStream. NDJSON v2 template delivers correctly formatted 6-line response with warning message. But frontend does NOT render it ??chat area stays empty. This is a PARSER ISSUE, not an H2 delivery issue.

response_headers.content_type: NOT YET CONFIRMED - panel too narrow to read
response_headers.note: Response body confirmed present via DevTools Response tab. Status 200, Protocol h2 confirmed from Network list columns.

diagnostic_conclusion.next_investigation: Check if Content-Type mismatch causes fetch() to reject the response before JS parser reads it
diagnostic_conclusion.not_h2_delivery: H2 delivery is working - body arrives intact
diagnostic_conclusion.frontend_problem: HuggingChat SvelteKit frontend fails to consume/render the injected ReadableStream response

observations: 1. Response tab shows 6 lines of NDJSON content - BODY IS PRESENT
4. Line 3: stream with warning token in Korean
5. Line 4: finalAnswer with same warning text, interrupted:false
8. Format matches HuggingChat expected NDJSON format perfectly
9. Despite body reaching browser, chat area is completely empty
10. Conclusion: Parser issue - frontend JS fails to process the ReadableStream
